items.title: Governor Not Convinced Vijay Has Majority, No Oath Tomorrow: Sources
items.summary: Superstar actor Vijay is set to become the next Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu, becoming another to complete the famed cinema-to-politics arc in the southern state.

items.title: Live Updates: U.K. Local Election Results Point to Big Losses for Starmer’s Party
items.summary: With votes still being tallied, Prime Minister Keir Starmer took responsibility for Labour losing hundreds of municipal seats but insisted he would not resign.
